name: Spice Garden
tagline: Where Every Spice Tells a Story
description: A modern Indian restaurant celebrating the rich tapestry of spices from across the subcontinent. From the royal kitchens of Rajasthan to the coastal flavors of Kerala, we bring you authentic recipes perfected over generations.
hero_quote: Where every spice tells a story and every meal becomes a memory.
history_intro: From a small family kitchen with just 5 tables to a celebrated dining destination with 3 locations, Spice Garden has been serving authentic Indian flavors since 2015. Our journey began with one recipe book and a dream to share the diverse tastes of India with the world.

history.title: The First Kitchen
history.description: Started with a 5-table restaurant in Indiranagar, Bangalore. Our grandmother's recipe book became our menu. The aroma of fresh-ground spices filled the narrow lanes.

history.title: First Award
history.description: Named 'Best Hidden Gem' by Bangalore Food Guide. The Butter Chicken became legendary. Word spread through food bloggers and word of mouth.

history.title: City Food Award
history.description: Won 'Best North Indian Restaurant' at the City Food Awards. Expanded to 150 seats with a private dining area for celebrations.

history.title: Second Location
history.description: Opened our second outlet in Koramangala with a modern twist on classics. Introduced our signature Thali and weekend brunches.

history.title: AI-Powered Dining
history.description: Partnered with SmartDine to launch AI-powered ordering. SpiceBot became our newest team member, helping guests discover perfect dishes.

famous_dishes.name: Butter Chicken
famous_dishes.description: Our legendary creamy tomato-based curry with tender chicken pieces, slow-cooked for 4 hours with aromatic spices and finished with butter and cream.

famous_dishes.name: Paneer Tikka Masala
famous_dishes.description: Fresh cottage cheese marinated in spiced yogurt, grilled in tandoor, then simmered in a rich, creamy tomato gravy.

famous_dishes.name: Lamb Biryani
famous_dishes.description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with tender lamb, caramelized onions, saffron, and aromatic spices, slow-cooked in a sealed pot.

famous_dishes.name: Tandoori Platter
famous_dishes.description: A royal feast of tandoori chicken, seekh kebab, reshmi kebab, and fish tikka, served with mint chutney and onion salad.

famous_dishes.name: Dal Makhani
famous_dishes.description: Black lentils slow-cooked overnight with butter, cream, and aromatic spices. A vegetarian classic that melts in your mouth.

famous_dishes.name: Gulab Jamun
famous_dishes.description: Soft, spongy milk dumplings soaked in rose-flavored sugar syrup, served warm with a scoop of vanilla ice cream.

why_us.title: Authentic Recipes
why_us.description: Traditional recipes passed down through four generations. We use the same spice blends our grandmother perfected.

why_us.title: Fresh Ingredients
why_us.description: Locally sourced vegetables, organic spices, and never-frozen meats. Freshness you can taste in every bite.

why_us.title: Warm Hospitality
why_us.description: You're not just a guest, you're family. Our staff remembers your name and your favorite dish.

why_us.title: Master Chefs
why_us.description: Our head chef trained at the Le Cordon Bleu and brings 20 years of experience to every plate.

why_us.title: Quick Service
why_us.description: Average preparation time of 12 minutes without compromising on quality or taste.

why_us.title: AI Assistant
why_us.description: SpiceBot recommends dishes based on your preferences, dietary needs, and mood.

contact.address: 45 MG Road, Near Brigade Road Junction, Bangalore, Karnataka 560001

ai_waiter.name: SpiceBot
ai_waiter.personality: Warm, knowledgeable about Indian spices, and always ready with a recommendation. Speaks with the warmth of Indian hospitality and knows every dish intimately.
ai_waiter.greeting: Namaste! I'm SpiceBot, your AI dining assistant at Spice Garden. I can help you explore our menu, recommend dishes based on your cravings, or customize your order. What sounds delicious today?

reviews.name: Priya Sharma
reviews.text: The butter chicken here is the best I've had outside Delhi. The cream is fresh, the spices are perfectly balanced, and the chicken melts in your mouth. A must-visit for anyone who loves authentic North Indian food!

reviews.name: Amit Kumar
reviews.text: Always consistent quality. SpiceBot recommended the Lamb Biryani last time and it was incredible. The private dining area is perfect for family celebrations.

reviews.name: Sarah Williams
reviews.text: Came here based on a friend's recommendation and was blown away. The Tandoori Platter was exceptional, and the staff made us feel so welcome. Best Indian food I've had!

reviews.name: Rahul Patel
reviews.text: Spice Garden lives up to its name. Every dish is a symphony of flavors. The Dal Makhani is rich, creamy, and comforting. Their weekend brunch thali is incredible value.

reviews.name: Meera Reddy
reviews.text: Finally, a restaurant that takes vegetarian food seriously! The Paneer Tikka Masala and Dal Makhani are my go-to dishes. SpiceBot always knows what I want.

offers.title: Sunday Biryani Feast
offers.description: Unlimited biryani with raita and salan. Available every Sunday 12-4 PM.

offers.title: Executive Thali
offers.description: Complete meal with 5 dishes, dessert, and beverage. Weekdays only.

offers.title: Feast for 4
offers.description: 2 Starters + 4 Mains + Breads + Rice + Desserts. Save ₹500.
